svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="metrics-system" id="metrics-system"> <mxGraphModel dx="-594" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="620" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="A" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="核心监控指标体系
(全链路 · 与业务价值强相关)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="340" x="380" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="前端指标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="250" x="40" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="用户体验指标
FCP · CLS · TTFB · 首屏加载" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="55" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="异常指标
页面报错率 · 资源加载失败率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="55" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="后端指标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="250" x="310" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="D" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="接口指标
响应时间 · 成功率 · 报错率 · QPS" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="325" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务指标
JVM内存 · CPU使用率 · 线程数" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="325" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="网络指标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="250" x="580" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="CDN指标
资源命中率 · 加载延迟 · 节点可用性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="595" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="网络指标
接口请求延迟 · 丢包率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="595" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="业务指标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="250" x="850" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="H" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="转化指标
跳转率 · 转化率 · 客诉率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="865" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="I" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=11;" value="可用性指标
应用在线率 · 实例可用率" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="865" y="300" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="TIP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontSize=11;fontColor=#475569;" value="指标取舍原则：优先选择能反映业务健康度、可直接指导优化的核心指标，避免监控冗余" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="1060" x="40" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eA1" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.25;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eA2" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.4;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eA3" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#475569;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.6;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eA4" edge="1" parent="1" source="A" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;strokeWidth=1.5;endArrow=block;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="G4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 338px; height: 1px; padding-top: 32px; margin-left: 341px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
